get.description: Returns a paginated list of all movements with admin details
Returns a paginated list of movements pending review
Returns full admin details for a movement by ID

patch.description: Changes a movement's status (active, archived, rejected, pending_review)

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all users with admin details
Returns full admin details for a user by UUID

patch.description: Changes a user's role. Only superadmins can assign admin/superadmin roles
Changes a user's account status (active, suspended, banned, deactivated)

post.description: Authenticates user with email and password, returns token pair
Revokes all refresh tokens for the authenticated user

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user

post.description: Rotates a refresh token and returns a new access/refresh token pair
Creates a new user account and returns access/refresh token pair

get.description: Returns movements submitted by the current user
Returns a paginated list of active movements
Returns a list of movements sorted by supporter count
Searches movements by name using trigram similarity
Returns a list of movements sorted by trending score
Returns a single movement by slug
Returns a list of supporters for a movement
Returns the profile of the authenticated user

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile settings
